analysis.consistency: The entry is consistent with standard D&D 5e spell formatting. All required fields are present and the data types are appropriate for the content.
analysis.quality: High quality. The spell description is complete, accurately capturing the mechanics and limitations of the Alter Self spell, including the choice of options and the ability to switch options as an action.

options_check: Aquatic Adaptation: Provides underwater breathing and a swimming speed equal to walking speed.

Change Appearance: Allows transformation of physical appearance (height, weight, features, voice, etc.), but restricts changes in size category and basic bipedal/quadrupedal structure. The change can be re-applied using an action.
Natural Weapons: Grants magical unarmed strikes dealing 1d6 damage (type chosen by caster) and a +1 bonus to attack/damage rolls for these strikes. The caster gains proficiency with these attacks.
mechanics.concentration_note: The spell requires concentration, which is a critical mechanical element that correctly limits its use alongside other concentration spells.

analysis.issues: No significant errors or inconsistencies found. The mechanics are clearly laid out.
